mapper.sql: select eo.id, eo.exception_no as exceptionNo, eo.related_order_no as relatedOrderNo, eo.exception_type as exceptionType, eo.severity, eo.handle_status as handleStatus, eo.reason, eo.handle_action as handleAction, eo.handle_reason as handleReason, eo.handle_result as handleResult, eo.handle_evidence as handleEvidence, eo.handler_id as handlerId, eo.handler_name as handlerName, eo.handle_time as handleTime, eo.created_at as createTime, eo.updated_at as updateTime
mapper.select: select count(1) from payment_exception_order eo where eo.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and eo.del_flag = 0 and eo.exception_type in ('CHANNEL_CALLBACK_FAILED', 'AMOUNT_MISMATCH', 'STATUS_MISMATCH', 'REFUND_MISMATCH') and eo.handle_status in ('PENDING', 'PROCESSING')
mapper.update: update payment_exception_order set handle_status = #{handleStatus}, handle_action = #{handleAction}, handle_reason = #{handleReason}, handle_result = #{handleResult}, handle_evidence = #{handleEvidence}, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handler_name = #{handlerName}, handle_time = #{handleTime}, updated_by = #{handlerId}, updated_at = #{handleTime} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and del_flag = 0 and handle_status in ('PENDING', 'PROCESSING')
